---
title: SharedSvelteAccu
format: html
filters:
  - quarto-svelte
quarto-svelte:
  use:
    - ../components/AccuList.svelte
    - ../components/AccuData.svelte
---

> Idea: AccuLogic (and View) + AccuJSON (Data only). Checl subcribe mechanism.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
myAccuList = html`<my-acculist></my-acculist>`
myAccuData = html`<my-accudata></my-accudata>`
```
